profile.name: Abid Shahriar
profile.title: Junior Software Engineer
profile.about: Hi! I am Abid Shahriar. I have almost 2 years of experience in writting backend API. Primarily worked with ruby on rails, now exploring the goodness of FastAPI. I know few scripting languages like Ruby & Python has a strong demand in backend engineering. I also familiar with languages like C++, C. Other than that during my academia I've built multiple projects using php. Having a good enough knowledge on DBMS and system architecture helps me out to decompose complex backend systems. I use to solve coding problems in few online judges like Leetcode, Codeforces, Hackerrank. Beyond this I am passionate about exploring the word of AGI. Feel free to each out at shahriarswapnil10@gmail.com

skills.experience: I built a number of projects using Ruby on Rails during my internship. Aditionally, I have experience working with Grape, a REST-like API framework. In my industry career I mostly worked with PostgreSQL, but I also worked with MySQL on bunch of other projects. Currently, I am working on a personal project using FastAPI.

I have written several Python projects based on The Big Book of Small Python Projects. In my previous company, I worked with Grape, a Ruby-based API framework, to build RESTful APIs. During my academic years, I primarily used raw PHP to build various projects. I also use C++ for competitive programming and problem-solving, apart from that I have basic understanding of C.

During my academic years, I used Bootstrap and CSS to build basic user interfaces for my projects. I designed my portfolio using Astro and Tailwind CSS, and working extensively with Tailwind's utility classes helped me gain a better understanding of several CSS concepts that I had previously found confusing. I also worked with React.js during my research assistantship at L A Technologies.

As a software engineer, I use Git, Postman for API testing, and Linux-based environments in my daily workflow. Outside of software development, I have spent time creating 3D stuff. Some of which are available on my ArtStation profile. During that time, I worked with Blender and Autodesk Maya to design hard surface.

works: Designed resource-oriented RESTful APIs following HTTP standards, improving frontend integration and data consistency.
Broke down complex business features into maintainable units, improving development efficiency.
Implemented bulk data import and CSV export functionality in multiple systems.
Built a modular API design pattern with Grape and Entities for uniform response structures.
Optimized slow queries and fixed N+1 issues in production APIs.
Deepened Rails expertise through hands-on development and maintenance.
Built service layer and integrated third-party APIs for external data processing.
Built Depot, a shopping cart app from Agile Web Development with Rails.
Implemented database associations and form handling for cart and checkout flows.
Managed user sessions and applied Rails best practices throughout the project.
Built another e-commerce backend API using Grape.
Followed company standards for API structure and response handling.
Worked in a project funded by Khulna University Research Cell under supervision.
Contributed to an open-source vehicle tracking system using React.js and Java.
Developed vehicle management, route creation, and scheduling features.
Managed a team of 3, handling project planning, task delegation, and delivery.
Created scripts to automate common tasks and improve development productivity.
